title: Convert web app to mobile-friendly app layout

requirements.text: Redesign the frontend layout and navigation to be mobile-first and app-like: replace the sticky top navigation bar with a bottom tab bar (Dashboard, Analysis, History, Alerts), use full-viewport-height pages with no horizontal overflow, and ensure all touch targets are at least 44px tall for comfortable tap interaction.
acceptanceCriteria: A bottom tab bar with icons and labels is visible on all authenticated pages (Dashboard, Traffic Analysis, Detection History, Alerts)
The top navigation bar (Layout.tsx / Navigation.tsx) is replaced or hidden in favor of the bottom tab bar
Each tab navigates to its corresponding page without full page reload
The Alerts tab shows an unread badge count when there are active alerts
All pages fill the full viewport height and scroll vertically without horizontal overflow
Touch targets (buttons, tabs, list rows) are at minimum 44px in height
The app renders correctly on a 375px wide screen (iPhone SE baseline)

requirements.text: Update the Dashboard, Traffic Analysis, Detection History, and Alerts pages to use a card-stacked, single-column mobile layout. Remove multi-column grid layouts and replace them with vertically stacked full-width cards. Add a sticky page header with the current page title and a user avatar/logout icon in the top-right corner.
acceptanceCriteria: All stat cards on the Dashboard stack vertically in a single column on screens narrower than 640px
The RecentEventsFeed and AlertsPanel display as full-width scrollable lists
The TrafficInputForm fields stack vertically and use full-width inputs
The DetectionHistoryTable scrolls horizontally only if needed, or collapses columns into a card-per-row layout on small screens
Each page has a sticky top header bar showing the page title and a logout/profile icon
No content is cut off or requires horizontal scrolling on a 375px wide viewport

requirements.text: Update the Login page to resemble a mobile app splash/onboarding screen: center the logo and app name vertically in the full viewport, display a short tagline, and show the 'Sign In with Internet Identity' button as a prominent full-width call-to-action at the bottom of the screen.
acceptanceCriteria: The Login page fills the full viewport height
The logo and app name are vertically centered
A short tagline is visible below the app name
The Sign In button spans nearly full width (max ~320px) and is positioned in the lower portion of the screen
The dark cybersecurity theme is preserved on the login screen

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve all existing backend logic and data models in backend/main.mo
Maintain the existing dark cybersecurity-themed design system defined in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js
nonGoals: Building a native Android or iOS application
Integrating Weka ML model or Android-specific APIs
Adding push notifications via native mobile OS APIs
SQLite or any external database integration
Changing the backend classification logic or detection history storage
